title: Kia India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Kia India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Quality Control Engineer with drive and ambition, Kia India in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Kia India:
Kia India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kia India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
